subcodes.first_line: ...To my honored and distinguished sister do thou convey the expression of my heartfelt, my intense longing. Day and night she liveth in my remembrance
subcodes.first_line_orig: حضرت اخت را به جان و دل و روح قلب و فؤاد مشتاق و در لیل و نهار در حقیقت جان و وجدان مذکور
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @business; financial; property matters, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
